CONTENT.Club career: On 5 July 2018, Diop signed his first professional contract with Monaco after his debut season with the reserve side of Rennes. He made his professional debut in a 4–0 loss to Paris Saint-Germain on 4 August 2018 in the Trophée des Champions.On 29 August 2022, fellow Ligue 1 club Nice announced the signing of Diop from Monaco.
CONTENT.Personal life: Sofiane's younger brother Edan Diop is also a professional footballer.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the OGC Nice websiteSofiane Diop at the French Football Federation (in French)Sofiane Diop – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in FrenchSofiane Diop – UEFA competition record (archive)
CONTENT.International career: Diop was born in France to a Senegalese father and Moroccan mother. He holds both French and Senegalese nationalities. He was a youth international for the France U18s.Sofiane Diop opted to play for Morocco over France and Senegal.

SUMMARY: Sofiane Daouda Diop (born 9 June 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 1 club Nice. Born in France, he has opted to play for the Morocco national team.
